title: Grilled Kenyan Asparagus Skewers
description: A simple and flavorful dish from Kenya, featuring smoky grilled asparagus on skewers, seasoned with intense flavor.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat (400°F). Thread asparagus onto skewers.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Brush the Kenyan spice blend onto the asparagus.
Grill the asparagus for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until tender and slightly charred.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional Kenyan spice blend if desired.
